name: Maraschino Cherry Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt together three times.
2. Cream butter with 2/3 cup sugar until fluffy.
3. Add egg yolks; beat until light.
4. Mix cherry juice and enough milk to make 7/8 cup liquid.
5. Alternately add the flour mixture and liquid (ending with flour) to the creamed mixture, mixing well.
6. Stir in cherries and nuts.
7. Beat egg whites until just stiff; add reserved sugar and beat stiff.
8. Fold egg white mixture into batter.
9. Pour batter into a greased and lightly floured 9x13-inch baking pan, or 2 8-inch heart-shaped pans, or 1 greased and floured Bundt cake pan or tube pan.
10. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 to 35 minutes (9x13-inch cake); 25-30 minutes (heart-shaped pans); 40 to 45 minutes (Bundt or tube cake pan), or until a tester inserted into the center is clean.
11. Cool completely and frost with Cherry Cream Frosting, or as desired.
